metadata.description: SEO Dungeon skill suite for local SEO audits. 25 sub-skills and 18 sub-agents, plus optional adapters for DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Banana, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound, Bing Webmaster, and Unlighthouse. v2.2 adds Codex-default packaging, local CLI runtime support, shared rendering, SSRF-safe fetchers, and portable skill files.

plugins.name: seo-dungeon
plugins.description: SEO Dungeon skill suite for Claude Code compatibility. 25 sub-skills (21 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors) and 18 sub-agents cover technical SEO, content quality, schema, sitemaps, Core Web Vitals, local SEO, backlinks, GEO, and Google APIs.
